title: triticum aestivum subsp. vulgare
intro: Triticum aestivum subsp. vulgare, commonly known as common wheat, is a subspecies of the wheat plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, and is often used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Triticum aestivum subsp. vulgare include lowering cholesterol levels, reducing the risk of heart disease, and aiding in digestion. Triticum aestivum subsp. vulgare can be prepared as a tea, flour, or oil, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various conditions.
